TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Iratay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Lang-syo go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 260 buwan, 751 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 632 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 119 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Yami 81%, Amis 2%, Paywan 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Iratay hya' ga Ivalino. tay 'zil na Iratay hya' ga Imaorod. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Iratay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ irataj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu laŋ-s~ɕjo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, jami **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na irataj ħjaʔ ɣa i*alino. taj ʔzil na irataj ħjaʔ ɣa imaoro*. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ irataj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Iratay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Lang-syo go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 260 buwan, 751 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 632 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 119 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Yami 81%, Amis 2%, Paywan 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Iratay hya' ga Ivalino. tay 'zil na Iratay hya' ga Imaorod. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Iratay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ irataj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu laŋ-s~ɕjo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, jami **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na irataj ħjaʔ ɣa i*alino. taj ʔzil na irataj ħjaʔ ɣa imaoro*. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ irataj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
